texto: The way a chihuahua goes about eating a dead elephant is to take a bite and be very present with that bite. In spiritual growth the definitive act is to take one step and let tomorrow's step take care of itself!
explicacao: Citação de William H. Houff sobre temas ligados a tempo. “The way a chihuahua goes about eating a dead elephant is to take a bite and be very present with …” articula tempo, time, reflexao em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
